title: SMART READING - 211info
text: SMART READING METRO AREA SMART READING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Recruits volunteers to read one-on-one with children, fostering a love of reading and providing books for children to keep and add to their personal libraries. The North Coast Team is based out of SMART’s main office in Portland, but staff regularly visit the areas covered by those teams. 480 NE 9th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Literacy program participants: Ages 5-10 (Pre-K through grade 3) Volunteers: Must undergo a national criminal background check Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (971) 634-1628 , , Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Metro Area (971) 634-1628 Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Toll-free (877) 598-4633 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information. Volunteer applications available online. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Metro Area Team: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties North Coast Area Team: Clatsop County Services: Literacy Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
